name: Convertible Crib
description: Converts from crib to toddler bed to full-size bed â€” a long-term investment.

name: Crib Mattress
description: Firm, breathable mattress that fits snugly in the crib with no gaps.

name: Fitted Crib Sheets (3-pack)
description: Waterproof fitted sheets â€” you'll want at least 3 for laundry rotation.

name: Baby Monitor (Video)
description: Video monitor with night vision so you can check on baby without entering the room.

name: White Noise Machine
description: Helps baby sleep by masking household sounds. Highly recommended by sleep experts.

name: Baby Dresser/Changing Table Combo
description: Doubles as dresser and changing station â€” saves nursery space.

name: Changing Pad & Covers (2)
description: Waterproof changing pad with contoured sides and 2 washable covers.

name: Glider or Rocking Chair
description: Essential for midnight feedings and soothing. Look for washable cushion covers.

name: Infant Car Seat
description: Required by law to leave the hospital. Convertible or infant-only both work.

name: Stroller
description: Choose based on lifestyle: jogging, city, or travel system (pairs with infant car seat).

name: Baby Carrier / Wrap
description: Keeps hands free while keeping baby close. Great for newborns and infants.

name: Diaper Bag Backpack
description: Backpack style leaves hands free. Look for multiple compartments and insulated pockets.

name: Breast Pump
description: Often covered by insurance. Check with your insurer before buying. Double electric recommended.

name: Nursing Bras (3-pack)
description: Get measured for the right fit. You'll wear these constantly if breastfeeding.

name: Nursing Pillow (Boppy or My Brest Friend)
description: Supports baby during feeding and reduces arm/back strain.

name: Bottle Set (newborn nipples)
description: Even breastfed babies may need bottles. Dr. Brown's and Comotomo are popular picks.

name: Bottle Brush & Drying Rack
description: Dedicated bottle brush keeps things sanitary. A rack keeps bottles organized while drying.

name: Breast Milk Storage Bags
description: Pre-sterilized bags for freezing and storing breast milk. Lansinoh and Medela are top brands.

name: Infant Bathtub
description: Newborn-safe tub with sling insert. Look for one that transitions to toddler use.

name: Baby Wash & Shampoo (tear-free)
description: Gentle, tear-free formula safe for newborn skin. Mustela and Johnson's are popular.

name: Baby Towels with Hood (3-pack)
description: Hooded towels keep baby warm after baths. Super soft options are best for sensitive skin.

name: Diapers â€” Newborn & Size 1
description: Stock up on both sizes. Newborn may only be needed 1â€“2 weeks depending on baby's size.

name: Baby Wipes (sensitive skin)
description: Fragrance-free, sensitive skin wipes. Water Wipes or Pampers Sensitive are top picks.

name: Baby Nail Clippers or File
description: Newborn nails grow fast and are sharp. Electric nail files are safest for beginners.

name: Baby Thermometer (rectal/temporal)
description: Rectal is most accurate for newborns; temporal artery (forehead) is easiest to use.

name: Nasal Aspirator (Frida NoseFrida)
description: Clears stuffy noses safely. The NoseFrida is beloved by parents worldwide.

name: Baby Swing or Bouncer
description: Soothing motion for fussy babies. Many parents call this a lifesaver.

name: Play Mat / Activity Gym
description: Encourages tummy time and sensory development. Includes hanging toys and mirror.

name: Onesies (0â€“3M, 3-packs)
description: Stock up on 0â€“3M and 3â€“6M sizes. Snap crotch onesies are easiest for diaper changes.

name: Sleep Sacks / Wearable Blankets
description: Safer than loose blankets in the crib. Get multiple for rotation. Nested Bean and HALO are top picks.
